entries.title: EXHORTATION TO MARTYRDOM 8 on deuteronomy 18:20
entries.excerpt: We can be prepared to find some prophet even of impiety—and perhaps not just one but several—who will tell us of a word of the Lord, which the Lord has not at all commanded, or a "word of wisdom" which has nothing whatever to do with wisdom. His purpose is to slay us by the word of his mouth.
